tools.description: Inspect RTG state and workflow guidance; Lane: state_and_discovery; call this before schema-dependent work.
tools.name: rtg_get_system_state

tools.description: Read detailed RTG request shapes and workflows; Lane: state_and_discovery; use topic capabilities for the tool map.
tools.name: rtg_get_usage_guide

tools.description: Stage an ergonomic schema migration; Lane: knowledge_engineering; inspect current schema and obtain approval first.
tools.name: rtg_stage_schema_migration

tools.description: Dry-run ergonomic anchor records without mutation or ledgering; Lane: live_graph.
tools.name: rtg_validate_live_anchor_records

tools.description: Apply ergonomic anchor records to live state; Lane: live_graph; discover schema first.
tools.name: rtg_apply_live_anchor_records

tools.description: Dry-run normalized live graph changes without mutation or ledgering; Lane: live_graph.
tools.name: rtg_validate_live_graph_changes

tools.description: Apply normalized live graph changes; Lane: live_graph; use the validation predecessor for risky writes.
tools.name: rtg_apply_live_graph_changes

tools.description: Stage an advanced normalized knowledge batch; Lane: knowledge_engineering; prefer ergonomic staging for ordinary schema work.
tools.name: rtg_stage_knowledge_changes

tools.description: Apply a staged migration atomically; Lane: migration; validate the projected state first.
tools.name: rtg_apply_migration_cutover

tools.description: Abandon staged migration work and prune safe non-live candidates; Lane: migration.
tools.name: rtg_abandon_migration

tools.description: Execute a read-only RTG query; Lane: query; detailed grammar and examples are in usage guides.
tools.name: rtg_execute_query

tools.description: Resolve zero, one, or multiple live anchors by typed fact; Lane: query; never guess among multiple matches.
tools.name: rtg_resolve_anchor_by_fact

tools.description: Read one RTG graph object by UUID; Lane: state_and_discovery.
tools.name: rtg_get_object

tools.description: List current migration-store records; Lane: migration; use history for pruned or rejected work.
tools.name: rtg_list_migrations

tools.description: Read one current migration-store record by ID; Lane: migration.
tools.name: rtg_get_migration

tools.description: Validate current or migration-projected RTG state without mutation; Lane: live_graph.
tools.name: rtg_validate_graph

tools.description: Discover anchor types and live counts; Lane: state_and_discovery; use before guessing type keys.
tools.name: rtg_discover_anchor_types

tools.description: Read schema details for selected anchor types; Lane: state_and_discovery; use before writes.
tools.name: rtg_get_schema_pack

tools.description: Export current coordinated RTG state or a compact summary; Lane: recovery_and_audit.
tools.name: rtg_export_system_snapshot

tools.description: Persist a coordinated RTG snapshot; Lane: recovery_and_audit; the runtime records the request, component calls, and terminal trace.
tools.name: rtg_persist_system_snapshot

tools.description: List RTG snapshots visible through configured storage; Lane: recovery_and_audit.
tools.name: rtg_list_persisted_snapshots

tools.description: Load one persisted RTG snapshot without restoring it; Lane: recovery_and_audit.
tools.name: rtg_load_persisted_snapshot

tools.description: Reconstruct committed canonical effects through an optional runtime cursor after explicit reset or compatible checkpoints; Lane: recovery_and_audit; operator use.
tools.name: rtg_replay_ledger

tools.description: Report exact available reconstruction evidence and direct historical requests to an isolated data-root copy; Lane: recovery_and_audit.
tools.name: rtg_verify_replay_from_ledger

tools.description: Read migration-related runtime traces in terminal-position order; Lane: migration.
tools.name: rtg_list_migration_history

tools.description: Deprecated health-only status for callers that still know the old tool name; Lane: recovery_and_audit; operator use.
tools.name: rtg_get_operation_outcome

tools.description: Restore coordinated RTG state from a supplied snapshot; Lane: recovery_and_audit; operator use.
tools.name: rtg_restore_from_snapshot
